# load packages
```{r}
# "/w5home/bmoore/miniconda3/lib/R"
# load packages
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(gridExtra)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
# library(statmod)
library(glmmTMB)
library(RColorBrewer)
# View the PuRd palette
display.brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")

# set working dir
wkdir <- "/w5home/bmoore/Pierre_sc_zebrafish/cellchat_allsamples_allpaths/"
setwd(wkdir)
```
# loop through dirs and read in files
```{r}
# loop through files to get weights
dirs <- list.dirs(
    path = wkdir,
    full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE
)
dirs
# create empty list for recovered/ nonrecovered
data_listR <- list()
data_listNR <- list()
# loop
for (d in dirs) {
    if (str_detect(d, "seurat_mouse_annot_")) {
        file <- list.files(path = d, pattern = "\\_df_net_signal_paths.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
        data <- read.table(file, header = TRUE)
        filename <- basename(file)
        name <- str_extract(filename, "\\d+WkN?R_+\\d+\\d")
        if (is.na(name)) {
            name <- str_extract(filename, "\\d+WkN?R_+\\d")
        }
        print(name)
        if (str_detect(name, "NR")) {
            data_listNR[[name]] <- data
        } else {
            data_listR[[name]] <- data
        }

        file2 <- list.files(path = d, pattern = "cellchat_df_net_signal_paths_all.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
        data2 <- read.table(file2, header = TRUE)
        # filename2 <- basename(file2)
        # name2 <- str_extract(filename2, "\\d+WkN?R_+\\d+\\d")
        # if (is.na(name2)) {
        #     name2 <- str_extract(filename2, "\\d+WkN?R_+\\d")
        # }
        name2 <- paste0(name, "_all")
        print(name2)
        if (str_detect(name2, "NR")) {
            data_listNR[[name2]] <- data2
        } else {
            data_listR[[name2]] <- data2
        }
    }
}
names(data_listNR)
names(data_listR)
```
# get data for tcells and fibroblasts as senders
```{r}
## loop to get all targets of a sender
# create empty dataframe
target_list <- c("7", "5")
df_T <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = 7, nrow = 0))
x <- c("source", "target", "treatment", "timepoint", "rep", "value", "pathway_name")
colnames(df_T) <- x
df_sig <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = 8, nrow = 0))
x <- c("source", "target", "treatment", "timepoint", "rep", "value", "pval", "pathway_name")
colnames(df_sig) <- x
# loop through NR datalist to get all NR values
for (j in 1:length(target_list)) {
    target <- target_list[[j]]
    for (i in 1:length(data_listNR)) {
        # get name (timepoint)
        name <- names(data_listNR)[i]
        n2 <- str_split_i(name, "_", 1)
        if (n2 == "sham") {
            timepoint <- "0Wk"
        } else {
            timepoint <- str_extract(name, "\\d+Wk") # Extracts "1wk", "2wk", etc.
        }
        rep <- str_split_i(name, "_", 2)
        if (str_detect(names(data_listNR)[i], "all")) {
            data <- data_listNR[[i]]
            # subset data
            data_subset <- data[data$target == target, ]
            # add source and timepoint data
            data_subset$target <- target
            data_subset$treatment <- "nonrecovered"
            data_subset$timepoint <- timepoint
            data_subset$rep <- rep
            df_T <- rbind(df_T, data_subset)
        } else {
            print("all paths not detected")
            # sig_data <- data_listNR[[i]]
            # # subset data
            # data_subset <- sig_data[sig_data$source == sender, ]
            # # add source and timepoint data
            # data_subset$source <- sender
            # data_subset$treatment <- "nonrecovered"
            # data_subset$timepoint <- timepoint
            # data_subset$rep <- rep
            # df_sig <- rbind(df_sig, data_subset)
        }
    }
    # loop through R dataset get all R values
    for (i in 1:length(data_listR)) {
        # get name (timepoint)
        name <- names(data_listR)[i]
        n2 <- str_split_i(name, "_", 1)
        if (n2 == "sham") {
            timepoint <- "0Wk"
        } else {
            timepoint <- str_extract(name, "\\d+Wk") # Extracts "1wk", "2wk", etc.
        }
        rep <- str_split_i(name, "_", 2)
        if (str_detect(names(data_listR)[i], "all")) {
            data <- data_listR[[i]]
            # subset data
            data_subset <- data[data$target == target, ]
            data_subset$target <- target
            data_subset$treatment <- "recovered"
            data_subset$timepoint <- timepoint
            data_subset$rep <- rep
            df_T <- rbind(df_T, data_subset)
        } else {
            print("all paths not detected")
            # sig_data <- data_listR[[i]]
            # # subset data
            # data_subset <- sig_data[sig_data$source == sender, ]
            # data_subset$source <- sender
            # data_subset$treatment <- "recovered"
            # data_subset$timepoint <- timepoint
            # data_subset$rep <- rep
            # df_sig <- rbind(df_sig, data_subset)
        }
    }
}
head(df_T)
df_T$prob <- as.numeric(df_T$prob)

write.table(df_T,
    file = "Tcell-Fibroblast_target_pathway_reps_OT.txt", sep = "\t",
    quote = F, row.names = F
)
```
# model each pathway
```{r}
senders <- unique(df_T$source)
paths <- unique(df_T$pathway_name)
outdir1 <- "Tcell_path_interactions/"
outdir2 <- "Fibroblast_path_interactions/"

for (j in 1:length(target_list)) {
    target <- target_list[[j]]
    print(target)
    # target <- "7"
    df_Tsub <- df_T[df_T$target == target, ]
    if (nrow(df_Tsub) != 0) {
        for (k in 1:length(senders)) {
            sender <- as.character(senders[[k]])
            print(sender)
            # sender <- "13"
            df_Tsub2 <- df_Tsub[df_Tsub$source == sender, ]
            if (nrow(df_Tsub2) != 0) {
                if (target == "7") {
                    outdir <- paste0(outdir1)
                } else if (target == "5") {
                    outdir <- paste0(outdir2)
                } else {
                    print("target not detected")
                    next
                }
                paths <- unique(df_Tsub$pathway_name)
                for (l in 1:length(paths)) {
                    path1 <- as.character(paths[[l]])
                    print(path1)
                    df_Tsub3 <- df_Tsub2[df_Tsub2$pathway_name == path1, ]
                    my_title <- paste0(
                        "Celltype communication source: ", sender,
                        " target: ", target, " pathway: ", path1
                    )
                    if (nrow(df_Tsub3) == 0) {
                        next
                    } else if (sum(df_Tsub3$prob) == 0) {
                        next
                    } else if (length(unique(df_Tsub3$treatment)) == 1) {
                        next
                    } else if (length(unique(df_Tsub3$timepoint)) == 1) {
                        next
                    } else {
                        # Initialize model type tracker
                        model_type <- "tweedie"
                        model_converged <- FALSE

                        # Check for all-zero groups
                        zero_check <- df_Tsub3 %>%
                            group_by(treatment, timepoint) %>%
                            summarize(all_zero = all(prob == 0), .groups = "drop") %>%
                            filter(all_zero) %>%
                            nrow()

                        # Attempt Tweedie first (unless all-zero groups exist)
                        # Tweedie model at 1.5 is a GLM that models zeros as Poisson and positive values as Gamma
                        if (zero_check == 0) {
                            model <- tryCatch(
                                {
                                    glmmTMB(prob ~ treatment * timepoint,
                                        family = tweedie(link = "log"),
                                        data = df_Tsub3
                                    )
                                },
                                error = function(e) NULL
                            )

                            if (!is.null(model)) model_converged <- (model$fit$convergence == 0)
                        }

                        # Fallback to zero-inflated Gamma with offset if:
                        # 1) Tweedie failed, or 2) all-zero groups exist
                        if (zero_check > 0 || !model_converged) {
                            df_fixed <- df_Tsub3 %>%
                                mutate(value_adj = ifelse(prob == 0, 1e-10, prob))

                            model <- glmmTMB(value_adj ~ treatment * timepoint,
                                ziformula = ~1,
                                family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                                data = df_fixed
                            )
                            model_type <- "gamma_zi_offset"
                            model_converged <- (model$fit$convergence == 0)
                        }
                        summary(model)
                        model_type
                        model_converged
                        # Add model type to output for reference
                        model_summary <- capture.output({
                            cat(
                                "MODEL TYPE:", model_type, "\n\n", "MODEL Convergence: ", model_converged,
                                "\n\n"
                            )
                            summary(model)
                        })
                        # Save outputs with model type in filename
                        writeLines(
                            model_summary,
                            paste0(outdir, sender, "-", target, "_", path1, "_", model_type, "_model_out.txt")
                        )

                        # Get estimated marginal means
                        emm <- emmeans(model, ~ treatment * timepoint, type = "response")
                        # Convert to dataframe for plotting
                        emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)
                        # write
                        write.csv(emm_df,
                            file = paste0(outdir, sender, "-", target, "_", path1, "_emm.csv"),
                            row.names = F
                        )
                        # get contrast means
                        # Get the interaction contrasts
                        contrasts <- emmeans(model, ~ treatment * timepoint)
                        pairwise <- contrast(contrasts, interaction = "pairwise", adjust = "none")
                        pw_df <- as.data.frame(pairwise)
                        # write df
                        write.csv(pw_df,
                            file = paste0(outdir, sender, "-", target, "_", path1, "_interactions_con.csv"),
                            row.names = F
                        )
                        # Test the treatment effect at each timepoint
                        simple_effects <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ treatment | timepoint)
                        em_df <- as.data.frame(simple_effects$emmeans)
                        # look at contrasts for recovered-nonrecovered at each timepoint
                        con_df <- as.data.frame(simple_effects$contrasts)
                        # write df
                        write.csv(con_df,
                            file = paste0(outdir, sender, "-", target, "_", path1, "_contrasts_R-NR.csv"),
                            row.names = F
                        )
                        # line plot
                        # Plot the difference between treatments across timepoints
                        # plot with CI and SE
                        p1 <- ggplot(emm_df, aes(x = timepoint, y = response, color = treatment, group = treatment)) +
                            geom_line() +
                            geom_point() +
                            geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), width = 0.1) +
                            ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
                            labs(
                                title = str_wrap(my_title, 40), x = "Time point",
                                y = "Predicted interaction strength"
                            ) +
                            scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired")
                        # scale_color_manual(values = brewer.pal(9, "PuRd")[4:6])

                        # make pdf
                        pdf(
                            file = paste0(
                                outdir, "cc_interaction_strength_emmeans_", sender,
                                "-", target, "_", path1, ".pdf"
                            ),
                            height = 4, width = 5
                        )
                        print(p1)
                        dev.off()
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
